arcs.title: The Gringotts Efficiency Inquiry
arcs.summary: Day 2: Christine discovered the audit via the log itself, left open on the corridor lectern by the Duty Goblin at seven forty-eight. She read it at seven forty-nine, corrected two inaccuracies, and added a fifth entry in a different ink by seven fifty-one. The Duty Goblin has placed a 'DISPUTED' marker beside the fifth entry; Christine has underlined it. The Subcommittee is now reviewing its review procedures. The Ministry has somehow obtained a photograph of the lectern. Day 3 should bring the Subcommittee into direct contact with Christine — either a formal meeting they have called, or an informal corridor encounter they did not plan — in which the audit itself begins to go in a direction the auditors had not modelled. Christine has not been observed to find any of this remarkable, which is its own data point.
